title: Spectacular Question Mark Gender Reveal Pinata (38cm x 50cm) - Striking Blue & Pink Colors - Perfect Surprise Announcement Party Prop - 1 Pc
features: STRIKING BLUE & PINK DESIGN: Our spectacular question mark gender reveal piñata showcases vibrant blue and pink colors, perfect for adding a pop of excitement to your gender reveal party or baby shower.

STURDY MATERIAL FOR MAXIMUM FUN: Made from high-quality, durable materials, this 38cm x 50cm piñata is designed to withstand the most enthusiastic of celebrants, ensuring a safe and hassle-free gender reveal experience.

IDEAL PARTY PROP: Whether you're hosting an intimate gathering or a large event, our versatile spectacular question mark gender reveal pinata serves as the perfect backdrop and focal point for your joyous celebration as you unveil the big news.

EASY TO USE & SET UP: Simply fill the piñata with your choice of blue or pink gender reveal items, such as confetti or candy, and hang it up at your party venue. Then invite your guests to join in the fun and reveal the surprise inside

CAPTURE THE MOMENT: Delight your guests, create lasting memories, and let our adorable pinata be the ultimate surprise element for your gender announcement party, ensuring an atmosphere filled with anticipation, excitement, and a dash of mystery.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lovely Pink Powder Blue Gender Reveal Party Add-On Items What will baby be? What do you think? Boy or Girl? Blue or Pink? Add some fun and mystery to your special occasion and impress your guests with these simple and elegant designs!
